svg.title: Quality Space irrep decomposition
svg.metadata: Volume 1 Chapter 16 graded Quality Space irrep decomposition and sensory role map.
svg.text: Linear coordinate sector R^6 (6 DOF) + quadratic stress sector Sym^2(R^6) (21 DOF) = 27 graded DOF under I_h.
Quadratic sector — Sym^2(R^6) irrep decomposition (21 DOF)
Linear sector — coordinate space R^6 = E_par (+) E_perp (6 DOF)
Footer discipline: modality labels are Tier 3; the graded I_h decomposition (6 linear + 21 quadratic = 27 DOF) is the structural claim.
